chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Acquittal Appeal No.S- 96 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Fresh Case 1.For orders on o/’objections 2.For hearing of main case 14-04-2025 None present for the appellant/complainant. **** Neither appellant is present nor his counsel is in attendance; no intimation is received; same was the position on last two consecutive dates of hearing, which shows that the appellant and his counsel are not interested in proceeding with this matter. Result thereof, instant Crl. Acquittal Appeal is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE Ahmad
